_comment: Showcase deck for the productized Persona QA Kit surface.

scenes.title: Persona QA Kit
scenes.subtitle: Portable persona/scenario journeys with no-LLM replay, review gates, and completion-state scoring
scenes.narration: Persona QA Kit turns the internal product-journey harness into a project-owned kit with stable commands and contracts.

scenes.title: Product Surface

items.label: Initialize
items.detail: kitsoki persona-qa init creates persona-qa.yaml, modular catalogs, drivers, fixtures, oracles, and schemas.

items.label: Run
items.detail: emit-run creates a scoped bundle from a project config instead of Kitsoki checkout paths.

items.label: Review
items.detail: review and complete produce durable artifacts and shared completion-state JSON for CI and arena.

scenes.caption: The public surface is a kit plus commands; the legacy runner is now an implementation backend.

scenes.title: Contracts

items.label: Schemas
items.detail: Versioned JSON Schemas define config, persona, scenario, driver, run, leg result, and review shapes.

items.label: Completion state
items.detail: complete emits schemas/completion-state.schema.json so consumers avoid stdout verdict scraping.

items.label: Transport axis
items.detail: TUI, web, and VS Code bridge legs carry explicit evidence contracts and proof levels.

scenes.caption: The kit exposes machine-checkable contracts and keeps older artifacts backward compatible.

scenes.title: No-LLM Gate

items.label: Validate
items.detail: persona-qa validate checks project config, catalogs, drivers, and copied public schemas.

items.label: Replay
items.detail: drive --mode replay proves artifact wiring without spend; replay-smoke keeps cassette-backed arena cells.

items.label: Story UI
items.detail: stories/scenario-qa calls the public emit-run command and keeps per-leg judgement independent.

scenes.caption: Automated gates stay deterministic; live capture remains an explicit operator-controlled workflow.
